title: v1.0.3 — Device Received Timestamp Observer Filter
changes: Updated SmsObserver to focus purely on the device SMS received timestamp (date column) instead of transaction ID (_id)
Guaranteed that incoming SMS messages are filtered strictly by arrival time on the device

title: v1.0.2 — Live Reactive State Sync, Status Bar & Version Display
changes: Removed full screen mode and restored native system status bar visibility with matching dark theme color
Added exact version and build number display (v1.0.2 Build 2) at the bottom of the Android application
Bound Room flow directly to ViewModel StateFlow via stateIn for instant real-time UI updates without restarting the app
Fixed SmsObserver cursor tracking with ID thresholding to catch all incoming SMS instantly while app is foregrounded

title: v1.0.1 — Instant SMS Capture Fix & Runtime Permissions
changes: Added runtime RECEIVE_SMS and READ_SMS permission prompt and status indicator
Integrated dual-engine real-time SMS capture using ContentObserver on Telephony.Sms.CONTENT_URI
Added transaction deduplication in Room database by reference ID and timestamp matching
Instant Compose state flow reactive updates without restarting the application

title: v1.0.0 — Official Production Release
changes: Instant real-time app UI updates upon receiving SMS without restarting the app
Multi-instance database invalidation and eager StateFlow stream collection
Backblaze B2 secure versioned APK storage ('jebena pay v1.0.0.apk')
SMS parsing engine for Telebirr, CBE Birr, Dashen Amole, and Bank of Abyssinia
Offline-first SQLite database with automated transaction classification
